vision_report.temporal_deltas: Across the 5-day sequence, there is zero change in the biological state. The environment is static and devoid of living plant matter in all frames.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological collapse. No photosynthesis is occurring as there are no leaves present.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of the white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot (P3) suggests a decorative or memorial placement rather than an active botanical cultivation.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish the spatial orientation of the pots against the registry; my second step was to validate the presence of biological matter within those boundaries. The conclusion is definitive: the registry is entirely aspirational. There are no plants present in any of the pots. The environment is a static, empty soil-based setup. The 'white rabbit' anchor is the only consistent feature, serving as a marker for a plant that is no longer there.
